import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut j = i
      while j < n
        mut bj = 0
        match string.byte_at(s, j)
        when Some(v)
          bj = v
        when None
          bj = 0
        end
        if bj == 32 or bj == 9
          j = j
          break_marker(j)
          j = n + 1
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      end
      let stop = if j > n
        j - 1
      else
        j
      end
      let token = string.substring(s, i, stop)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        result = result
      end
      i = stop
    end
  end
  result
end

fn break_marker(_ x: Int) -> Unit
  ()
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

fn read_required_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_required_line()
let line2 = read_required_line()
let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let target_str = string.trim(line2)
mut target = 0
match string.parse_int(target_str)
when Some(v)
  target = v
when None
  target = 0
end

match find_index(nums, target)
when Some(i)
  println("index=#{i}")
when None
  println("not_found")
end
